calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CHARLES RAMSEY FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. GWENDOLYN WASHINGTON APPEARING AS AGENT FOR PLAINTIFF.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY STEVEN RODRIGUEZ FOR DEFENDANT ARMINTA LOVE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $2045 ($1645 BACK RENT AND $400 ATTORNEY FEES). $822.50 DUE BY 5PM 10/3/05. THE BALANCE TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $102 FOR 12 MONTHS STARTING ON 11/1/05. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE AT 90 KISKA. DEFENDANT TO MEET WITH MS WASHINGTON AT 9:30AM ON 9/24/05 FOR RECERTIFICATION. DEFENDANT TO BE GIVEN PRIORITY FOR AN ELIGIBLE 1 BEDROOM APARTMENT. IF DEFENDANT REFUSES FIRST OFFER, RIGHT TO BE ON WAITING LIST NOT WAIVED, BUT TAKEN OFF PRIORITY STATUS. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, PLAINTIFF CAN FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION, WITH 24 HOUR PHONE NOTICE, FOR JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR 44 HARBOR ROAD. ALL PARTIES AGREE.

JUDGE PRO TEM:NILS ROSENQUIST ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:SUSAN MURPHY(218)
